title: crataegus beata var. compta
intro: Crataegus beata var. compta, also known as the 'Compta Hawthorn', is a variety of the Crataegus beata plant, which belongs to the rose family and is native to China. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects, making it useful in treating cardiovascular issues such as high blood pressure and heart failure. The health benefits of Crataegus beata var. compta include improved cardiovascular health, reduced inflammation, and antioxidant protection, as well as potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
